case_title: PATEL, RAMESH P. vs. TABAN, EMALIO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. AS TO DEFENDANT TABAN, EMALIO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TABAN, EMALIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 SIXTH ST #340, LEASE FORFEITED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TABAN, EMALIO

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TABAN, EMALIO
